ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the case */,
  "fact" TEXT /* Facts of the case */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue at hand */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the court */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reasoning behind the decision */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the case was decided */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the case */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court where the case was decided */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract type */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the case was filed */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date the case was heard */,
  "judgment_date" TEXT /* Date the judgment was made */,
  "appeal_status" TEXT /* Status of the appeal (e.g., pending, dismissed, upheld) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES contract_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the party is involved in */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (e.g., plaintiff, defendant) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the party */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the party */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge who presided over the case */,
  "judge_title" TEXT /* Title of the judge (e.g., Justice, Judge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtype (e.g., family, business) */,
  "subtype_description" TEXT /* Description of the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lawyer, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case outcome */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract case */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., won, lost, settled) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "appeal_status" TEXT /* Status of the appeal (e.g., pending, dismissed, upheld) */,
  "costs_awarded" TEXT /* Costs awarded to the winning party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_outcomes_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_search" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term used */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date of the search */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Results of the search (e.g., case IDs, case names) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_search_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the document is related to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the note is related to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the reminder is related to */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_text" TEXT /* Text of the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reminders_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the collaborator is working on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., lawyer, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_collaborators_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
